bug_report.summary: Line/column (caret position) indicator changes unexpectedly after debounced update (shows 1:1 instead of end-of-line position)
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new Markdown document (File → New File → Markdown).
Type a long single-line paragraph (as in the test scenario).
Stop typing and wait ~1.5 seconds for debounced counting to complete.
expected_behaviors: Caret position indicator (line:column) remains accurate and stable after the debounce finishes (e.g., if typing ended at the end of the line, it should show something like 1:144).
actual_behaviors: After the wait/debounced update, the line:column indicator differs from the pre-change behavior and shows 1:1 (appears to reset or display an incorrect caret position).
